title: RNA-Seq data analysis script for "Phenotypic Heterogeneity Affects Stenotrophomonas maltophilia K279a Colony Morphotypes and β-Lactamase Expression"
author: Abda, Ebrahim M
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This shell script performs the data analysis used in the publication "Phenotypic heterogeneity affects Stenotrophomonas maltophilia K279a colony morphotypes and β-lactamase expression" by Abda et al., 20015, Front. Microbiol., doi: 10.3389/fmicb.2015.01373
steps_raw: This shell script performs the data analysis used in the publication "Phenotypic heterogeneity affects Stenotrophomonas maltophilia K279a colony morphotypes and β-lactamase expression" by Abda et al., 20015, Front. Microbiol., doi: 10.3389/fmicb.2015.01373
